home.welcome: Welcome to Hammamet Garden Resort & Spa GuestHub
home.description: Discover a new way to experience your stay. Access daily activities, explore tonight's shows, request services, and interact in real-time — all from one place.
home.stayDescription: Jump directly to the feature you need. Everything is built for mobile, fast, and simple.
home.reviewsDesc: See what other guests think about their stay.
home.eventsDesc: Don't miss out on upcoming special events.
home.requestSongDesc: Ask the DJ for your favorite track and keep the vibe going.
home.serviceRequestDesc: Request a service easily and get a quick response.
home.complaintsDesc: Report any issue quickly so we can help right away.

nightShows.title: Tonight's Show
nightShows.description: Explore the weekly night show program for Week A and Week B.

guestReviews.title: Guest Reviews
guestReviews.description: Recent feedback from our guests. Share yours anytime.
guestReviews.emptyAction: Be the first to share feedback

specialEvents.title: Special events

songRequest.title: Song Request
songRequest.intro: Request your favorite song and let the DJ know what you want to hear!

complaints.intro: We value your feedback. Please let us know how we can improve your stay.

feedback.intro: Quick and anonymous — help us improve your stay.
